chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.81 of 2024 (Hafeezullah Abdul Rehman & others Vs. FOP & others) Date Order with signature of Judge Hearing (Priority) Case 1. For orders on CMA No.655/2024 (U/S 94). 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on CMA No.497/2024 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For hearing of CMA No.498/2024 (Stay). 13.01.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani, Advocate for the appellants. Mr. Aadil Channa, Advocate for respondents No.4 to 6. ************* Learned counsel for the appellants states that this appeal has become infructuous; hence on instructions he does not press this appeal. In view of the above statement, the appeal is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
